message:
The other day, I was rummaging through my closet and stumbled upon our family go-bags, which I’d packed a while ago but hadn’t thought about in ages. I decided to check them—just a little refresh, you know? To my surprise, I found a few snacks that had somehow made their way in there (hello, granola bars!) and I also noticed I needed to update some important documents. 

While it felt like a small win, it really did save the day when my kids came home from school, starving and ready for a snack attack! It reminded me how those little moments of preparedness can really make a difference.  

Have you checked your go-bags recently? What’s your go-to snack for emergency kits?
